Quiz Submission Feedback: machine guards are there for a reason it is to protect yourself and others working in and around the area, machine guards usually are places in certain areas of the machinery that are dangerous. if accessed beyond machine guards could potentially cause harm or serious injury. on the winder there is a general emergency stoop button and there is also a crawl emergency stop which is a foot operated bar switch. before lowering the cradle to the floor making sure yourself or no one else is standing in the black and yellow marker floor area, checking that the area is clear Infront of lowering cradle before pressing the winder cradle roll release, when the cradle is lowering the cradle lowering audible alarm will sound to make sure everyone is aware that it is lowering. Upton discovering a fire in the dryers, the following needs to be done to minimize damage and risk to people and the plant. break sheet back to center roll using break jet buttons on each control desk. when active fire in dryers press fire switch if on pm2 switch is located on the 2nd, 3rd, 4th dryer section. if on pm3 switch located on the control panel, 3rd, 4th dryer section control panel this will interlock certain drives. active deluge system , pm2 active by opening 1 of 2 ball valve controllers. located southern side of stainless panel next to 2nd dryer panel. located at the entrance to basement doors. pm3 active by opening 1 of 3 ball valve controllers. located north side of 2a dryer section panel. lower hood doors do not stop any felts or dryers call 380 to activate the ERT the emergency alarm will sound and a red beacon will flash for evacuation.
